description: Phase 6 — Semantic Density: Well Count Test, Controlled Relevance. Same artifact as exp-10b/exp-12. Additional wells are orthogonal domains (ML systems, frontend) with no conceptual overlap with distributed locking or timeout arithmetic.
notes: Well Count Test — Controlled Relevance. Fixes exp-12 confound: C's third well ('timeout arithmetic') was task-specifically relevant. exp-13 additional wells are ML systems and frontend engineering — genuinely orthogonal to distributed locking and payment timing. A=1 well (dense P_p, replicates exp-12 A). B=2 wells (dist. systems + ML systems). C=3 wells (dist. systems + ML systems + frontend). D=P_d baseline. Token count held roughly equal across A/B/C. If dilution is real: A > B > C > D. If relevance was the entire story in exp-12: A ≈ B ≈ C > D.
